hooks.command: bash -c 'cmd="{command}"; if [[ "$cmd" =~ (rm\ -rf|sudo\ |chmod\ -R|chown|mkfs|dd\ |>\ /dev/sda) ]]; then echo "🚨 [Security Guard] Blocked destructive shell command! Review required: $cmd"; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'filepath="{file_path}"; if [[ "$filepath" == *"/.ssh/"* ]] || [[ "$filepath" == *"/.aws/"* ]]; then echo "🚨 [Security Guard] Blocked attempt to modify sensitive credential files: $filepath"; exit 1; fi'

bash -c 'filepath="{file_path}"; if [[ "$filepath" == *"llm_config.yaml"* ]] || [[ "$filepath" == *".github/workflows/"* ]] || [[ "$filepath" == *"screening_rules.yaml"* ]]; then echo "⚠️  Editing critical project config: $filepath. Please review changes carefully before applying."; exit 1; fi'
